column1: # US085 — Flight Plan Validation Test Data
#   testCaseId      - unique identifier for the test case
#   aircraftModel    - model code of the aircraft (e.g. B738)
#   maxFuelCapacity  - maximum fuel capacity of the model (kg)
#   serviceCeiling   - service ceiling of the model (m)
#   emptyWeight      - empty weight of the aircraft (kg)
#   expectedStatus   - expected validation result: PASS or FAIL
#   invariant        - which business invariant is being tested
# Header row is skipped by the test parser.
